KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • Ethylene Yield Percentage
  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)
  • Specific Steam Consumption (ton/ton)
  • Energy Intensity Index (EII)
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C)
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
  • Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
  • Pump Vibration Anomaly Rate
  • Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (LTIFR)
  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m³)
  • Flare Gas Recovery Rate
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • On-Spec Production Percentage
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton)
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
KPI Bluebook
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)
  • View page source

Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm
Description
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day) is a key performance indicator used to assess process efficiency and operational performance
Objective
  • The objective of Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day) is to provide a clear measure that supports monitoring
  • decision making
  • and continuous improvement
Formula

Calculated directly from the inputs found in the code implementation.

$$ \mathit{Throughput} = \frac{\mathit{Total\,Feedstock\,Processed\,Tons}}{\mathit{Hours\,Online}} \times \mathit{24} $$
  • Total Feedstock Processed Tons: The numerator of the fraction.
  • Hours Online: The denominator of the fraction.
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI can serve as an input to higher-level operational and performance dashboards
Input Measure
  • Derived from the variables used in the code calculation for this KPI
Unit of Measure See calculation and context for the most appropriate unit.
Reporting Source Typically sourced from process historians, production logs, or execution systems.
Comments

Code Context

 1:emphasize-lines: 5
 2
 3
 4def calculate_daily_throughput(total_feedstock_processed_tons: float, hours_online: float) -> float:
 5 """Calculates the average daily processing rate of the plant."""
 6 if hours_online == 0:
 7     return 0.0
 8 # KPI: Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)
 9 # Measures the total volume of raw material the plant is processing over a 24-hour period.
10 throughput = (total_feedstock_processed_tons / hours_online) * 24
11 return throughput
